news_items.headline: Marlins pull plug on Eury Pérez's perfect game bid — and fans let them hear it
news_items.summary: Eury Pérez retired all 21 batters he faced, but the Marlins opted for caution as the young ace returns from injury. Fans were not happy.

news_items.headline: Here are the top tools in the 2026 Draft class
Two Errors, Two Homers, Too Many Missed Chances: Rays 0, Astros 2
news_items.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays came into Sunday’s game against the Houston Astros riding a nine-game homer streak. That streak came to an end on a day of a shutout loss, when the lucky breaks did not go the Rays’ way. Houston wasted no time accepting two unexpected gifts in the bottom of the first. Ben […]

news_items.headline: Scoreless In Seattle, Again
news_items.summary: Blue Jays 0 Mariners 4 So…..for the second game in a row, we didn’t score. Today, three hits, one extra base hit (Vlad’s double), with singles from Nathan Lukes and Ernie Clement. And we had two walks. Surprisingly, only six strikeouts, but a lot of soft contact. We had one hard hit ball, Vlad’s double […]

news_items.headline: Huascar Brazoban almost sank Mets with rare nightmare ninth inning
news_items.summary: Huascar Brazoban came into Sunday having allowed just one run over his last nine appearances, but the right-hander endured as rough an outing he’s had all year.
